title: Systems Product Manager
description: We are building the future of underwater maintenance drones. Looking for a technical PM to bridge the gap between our computer vision team and industrial clients. Focus on AUV autonomous systems and hardware-software integration.
matchReason: Direct AUV + systems PM match. AGH Marines background is exceptional signal.

title: Technical Product Manager — Energy Intelligence
description: Optimizing the UK power grid using RL agents. We need someone who understands systems modeling and ROI for energy infrastructure. Looking for candidates with strong background in industrial data and AI-driven efficiency.
matchReason: Strong energy + AI systems overlap. ProcessMate AI background maps well.

title: AI Growth PM
description: Zero-to-one product growth for our AI-powered content automation suite. Focusing on rapid experimentation and user acquisition in SE Asia.
matchReason: Founder background + zero-to-one bias. Singapore relocation is an adventure.

title: Product Manager — Autonomous Systems
description: Helsing builds AI software for European defence. We need technical PMs who can translate between AI research (RL, computer vision) and mission-critical military requirements. You will own end-to-end product lifecycle for autonomous airborne and space-based systems — from R&D prototyping to operational deployment in contested environments. Cross-functional leadership across engineering, robotics, and mission planning teams. Protecting democratic sovereignty through European AI.
matchReason: Highest-mission role. Autonomous systems + computer vision + AUV trajectory maps precisely. Relocation to Munich/Berlin/London supported.

title: AI Product Manager — Robotic Picking Systems
description: Nomagic builds AI-driven robotic picking systems for e-commerce and logistics. Looking for a PM to own the AI product portfolio — working between computer vision and ML research teams and enterprise clients. Based in Warsaw. Series B funded, ~100 engineers. Strong technical background required; experience in perception systems a strong plus.
matchReason: Warsaw-based, no relocation needed. Computer vision + AI PM + robotics = perfect profile match. Series B stability.

title: Product Manager — Space Systems Software
description: KP Labs develops AI payloads for Earth observation satellites — on-board data processing at the edge. Looking for a PM who understands systems-level thinking across satellite hardware and downstream data product teams. Close POLSA and ESA partnerships. Mission-driven environment with direct space sector impact.
matchReason: POLSA + Space alignment is very strong. Poland-based. Satellite systems PM is a rare and career-defining niche.

title: Founding Product Manager — AI Process Automation
description: Seed-stage startup automating back-office workflows for European SMEs using LLM-native agents. Looking for our first PM — someone who has done product discovery in messy B2B environments and can ship fast. You will set the roadmap, talk to customers weekly, and directly spec features with a 3-person engineering team. ProcessMate-like environment.
matchReason: ProcessMate AI is direct experience match. Zero-to-one founding PM = immediate credibility.

title: Technical Product Manager — Industrial Energy AI
description: Building AI agents that optimize industrial energy consumption in real-time — factories, warehouses, cold storage. Looking for a Technical PM who can bridge data science teams and industrial clients. Strong systems thinking required. Experience with B2B discovery, technical roadmapping, and working with energy infrastructure a major plus. Seed-stage, high-ownership, zero-to-one.
matchReason: Energy + AI systems + B2B discovery is strong overlap. Berlin relocation supported.
